overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along railroad tracks through an industrial district. The scene features horse-drawn carriages, factories with smokestacks, and industrial warehouses under an overcast, smog-filled sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial rail yard with water tower and telegraph poles

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left traveling in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the railroad tracks through the industrial area, approaching a signal light

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the dirt road parallel to the tracks

entered.detail: tall wooden water tower with metal supports beside the industrial building
large brick industrial building with multiple windows and smokestacks in background
metal railroad tracks running parallel to the dirt path
wooden telegraph poles with crossbars and wires lining the tracks
wooden loading platform beside the tracks
tall railroad signal light with crossbar signal

segments.scene_description: The character walks along railroad tracks in an industrial district, passing a wooden platform and telegraph poles. A water tower and large industrial building dominate the right side while a horse-drawn carriage passes on the left. The atmosphere is hazy with industrial smoke.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rail yard with multiple tracks and signal lights

events.description: character crosses over the railroad tracks to the other side of the rail yard

agents.ego_description: walking along the tracks then crossing over to the other side while navigating through the rail yard

entered.detail: low industrial warehouses and sheds in the rail yard
tall factory smokestacks emitting dark smoke into the sky

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an open rail yard, passing a signal light and crossing over the tracks. Industrial warehouses and smokestacks dominate the background while the water tower recedes behind. The ground is a mix of dirt and grass between the tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with canning factory and horse traffic

events.description: moving from open rail yard onto busier industrial street with multiple horse-drawn carriages
passing a seated man resting against the brick wall on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt road beside the tracks, navigating through horse-drawn carriages and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: stationary horse-drawn carriage waiting on the street
man sitting on the ground leaning against the brick wall

entered.detail: tall red brick wall with iron fence on top running alongside the path
building with 'CANNING' painted in large white letters on the brick facade
wooden barrels and crates stacked beside the brick wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a busier industrial street lined with a brick wall and canning factory. Multiple horse-drawn carriages occupy the road while the character walks on the dirt path beside the tracks. The scene ends with the character passing a seated man against the wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a hazy industrial district that transitions from a quiet rail siding into a bustling factory street. It begins with the character walking along railroad tracks past a wooden platform and telegraph poles, while a water tower and large industrial building loom through the smog. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens into a wide rail yard where the water tower recedes and the view expands to reveal distant smokestacks and signal lights across a terrain of dirt and grass. The environment then shifts toward a denser industrial corridor lined by a brick wall and a canning factory, with the quiet of the tracks replaced by multiple horse-drawn carriages occupying the road. Finally, the camera follows the character along a dirt path before passing a man seated against the wall.
